elements.sent-2411-1044: Finally, let $\phi:V' \rightarrow V$ denote the map induced (by extending linearly) the maps $\phi_t:V_t \rightarrow V$, sending $(f_1,\ldots,f_t)$ to $f_1 \cdots f_t$ (i.e. $\phi = \sum_{1 \leq t \leq t_0 \phi_t \circ \pi_t$, where $\pi_t:V' \rightarrow V_t$ is the canonically defined projection).}
